title: Celestial Moon Stars Cookie Cutter Set M Size | 3D Printed Kitchen Tool | Moon Star Baking Cutters | Space Theme Cookies
description: Create magical celestial-themed cookies with this enchanting moon and stars cookie cutter set! This medium-sized cutter collection features beautiful moon phases and twinkling star designs that will transform your baking into an otherworldly experience. Perfect for space enthusiasts, astrology lovers, and anyone who dreams of reaching for the stars through their baking creations. Each cutter in this celestial set is precision 3D-printed to ensure clean, sharp edges that create perfectly defined cookies every time. The ergonomic design makes cutting through dough effortless, while the smooth finish ensures easy release and professional-looking results. The intricate details of the moon phases and star patterns will impress both amateur bakers and seasoned professionals alike. This medium size measures approximately 7-8cm across, making them ideal for standard cookies that aren't too small or overwhelmingly large. The dimensions are perfect for creating beautiful cookies for parties, special occasions, or everyday magical moments in your kitchen. To use these cutters, simply roll out your favorite cookie dough to about 6mm thickness, press the cutter firmly into the dough, and lift to reveal your perfectly shaped celestial cookies. The sharp edges cut cleanly through most cookie dough types, from sugar cookies to gingerbread. Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. Clean gently with warm soapy water and dry immediately to maintain the quality and longevity of your cutters. These celestial cookie cutters make extraordinary gifts for numerous occasions throughout the year. They're perfect for astronomy enthusiasts celebrating birthdays, astrology lovers hosting moon phase parties, teachers creating educational treats about space, or anyone planning celestial-themed baby showers and weddings. The magical moon and star designs also make them ideal for Halloween treats, midnight snacks, camping adventures, or simply adding wonder to everyday baking sessions. About our shop: We specialize in handcrafted, 3D-printed baking tools that bring creativity to your kitchen. Each item is printed to order in small batches, ensuring quality and attention to detail. We proudly ship to customers across the US and EU, helping bakers worldwide create memorable treats that spark joy and imagination.
